message:
fix: prevent polecat spawns from creating orphan databases (gt-sv1h)

Two-layer fix for orphan beads_<prefix> databases on Dolt server:

1. ensureDatabaseInitialized() now checks for redirect file first.
   Polecats/crew/refinery use redirects — they should never create
   their own database. This eliminates the high-volume source of
   orphans (every polecat spawn was creating one).

2. InitBeads() and AddRig() drop beads_<prefix> after bd init when
   it differs from rigName. Defense-in-depth for gt rig add, which
   legitimately calls bd init.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
